feature_description: Zerith-var lobs a flaming skull at an enemy, dealing Flame Damage. Grants a corpse on use.
name: Flame Skull

feature_description: Zerith-var summons a flaming skeleton that charges at the enemy and explodes, dealing Flame Damage in an area.
name: Blastbones

feature_description: Zerith-var creates a field of bones that deals Magic Damage over time to enemies and generates corpses.
name: Boneyard

feature_description: Zerith-var summons a skeletal mage that attacks enemies with elemental bolts for a duration.
name: Skeletal Mage

feature_description: Zerith-var summons a massive frost atronach that smashes enemies three times, applying Major Vulnerability.
name: Frozen Colossus

feature_description: Zerith-var slashes enemies in front with a scythe of dark energy, dealing Magic Damage and healing based on enemies hit.
name: Death Scythe

feature_description: Zerith-var wraps themselves in protective bone, granting Major Resolve and returning damage to melee attackers.
name: Bone Armor

feature_description: Zerith-var siphons energy from nearby corpses, healing themselves and generating Ultimate.
name: Bitter Harvest

feature_description: Zerith-var summons a totem of bone that fears nearby enemies and grants Minor Protection to allies.
name: Bone Totem

feature_description: Zerith-var transforms into a powerful Bone Goliath, gaining increased Health and access to devastating attacks.
name: Bone Goliath

feature_description: Zerith-var knits flesh together to heal an ally, but applies Minor Defile to the target briefly.
name: Render Flesh

feature_description: Zerith-var cleanses negative effects from themselves and nearby allies, removing up to 2 negative effects.
name: Expunge

feature_description: Zerith-var consumes a corpse to heal themselves and nearby allies over time.
name: Life Amid Death

feature_description: Zerith-var summons a ghostly spirit that heals the companion and transfers a portion of damage taken to itself.
name: Spirit Guardian

feature_description: Zerith-var revives fallen allies using necromantic power, bringing them back with partial health.
name: Reanimate

feature_description: Tanlorin breathes fire at enemies in a cone, dealing Flame Damage and applying burning.
name: Fiery Breath

feature_description: Tanlorin slashes an enemy with a flaming weapon, dealing immediate Flame Damage and additional damage over time.
name: Searing Strike

feature_description: Tanlorin launches a fiery chain to pull an enemy to them, dealing Flame Damage and taunting.
name: Fiery Grip

feature_description: Tanlorin engulfs themselves in flames, dealing Flame Damage to nearby enemies over time.
name: Inferno

feature_description: Tanlorin plants a battle standard that deals Flame Damage to enemies and applies Major Defile.
name: Dragonknight Standard

feature_description: Tanlorin wraps themselves in protective scales, gaining Major Resolve and returning damage to melee attackers.
name: Spiked Armor

feature_description: Tanlorin summons talons from the ground to immobilize enemies and deal Magic Damage over time.
name: Dark Talons

feature_description: Tanlorin draws on draconic power to heal themselves and gain Health Recovery.
name: Dragon Blood

feature_description: Tanlorin surrounds themselves with draconic scales that reflect projectiles back at attackers.
name: Reflective Scale

feature_description: Tanlorin leaps through the air and crashes down, dealing Physical Damage and knocking back enemies.
name: Dragon Leap

feature_description: Tanlorin hurls a chunk of rock at an enemy, dealing Physical Damage and stunning them briefly.
name: Stonefist

feature_description: Tanlorin charges weapons with volcanic power, granting Major Sorcery to nearby allies.
name: Molten Weapons

feature_description: Tanlorin conjures a shield ofite volcanic rock, absorbing damage for themselves and nearby allies.
name: Obsidian Shield

feature_description: Tanlorin encases enemies inite stone, stunning them for an extended duration.
name: Petrify

feature_description: Tanlorin encases themselves in molten rock, limiting damage taken and dealing Flame Damage to nearby enemies.
name: Magma Armor

feature_description: Companion fires a powerful bow shot at a distant enemy, dealing Physical Damage.
name: Snipe

feature_description: Companion fires a volley of arrows at a target area, dealing Physical Damage over time.
name: Volley

feature_description: Companion fires an arrow that knocks back the enemy and disorients them.
name: Scatter Shot

feature_description: Companion fires an arrow coated in poison, dealing Poison Damage over time and interrupting enemies.
name: Poison Arrow

feature_description: Companion unleashes a rapid barrage of arrows at the target, dealing Physical Damage with each hit.
name: Rapid Fire

feature_description: Companion performs a powerful upward swing, dealing Physical Damage and knocking the enemy off balance.
name: Uppercut

feature_description: Companion charges at an enemy, dealing Physical Damage and stunning them on impact.
name: Critical Charge

feature_description: Companion swings their weapon in a wide arc, dealing Physical Damage to all enemies in front and applying a bleed.
name: Cleave

feature_description: Companion builds momentum, gaining Major Brutality and healing over time.
name: Momentum

feature_description: Companion delivers a powerful execution strike that deals increased damage to low health enemies.
name: Executioner

feature_description: Companion thrusts their weapon at the enemy, dealing Physical Damage and applying a taunt.
unlock_requirements: Companion using One Hand and Shield
name: Puncture

feature_description: Companion charges at an enemy with their shield, dealing Physical Damage and stunning them.
name: Shield Charge

feature_description: Companion slashes at an enemy's legs, dealing Physical Damage and applying Minor Maim.
name: Low Slash

feature_description: Companion braces with their shield, reflecting the next spell projectile back at the attacker.
name: Defensive Posture

feature_description: Companion raises their shield to block all incoming attacks, greatly reducing damage taken.
name: Shield Wall

feature_description: Companion unleashes an elemental blast based on their staff type, dealing Magic Damage with an elemental effect.
name: Destructive Touch

feature_description: Companion creates a wall of elemental energy that deals Magic Damage over time to enemies within.
name: Wall of Elements

feature_description: Companion focuses elemental energy into a powerful blast, dealing Magic Damage to a single target.
name: Force Shock

feature_description: Companion exposes an enemy's weakness to elemental damage, applying Minor Breach.
name: Weakness to Elements

feature_description: Companion calls down an elemental storm that devastates enemies in a large area with Magic Damage.
name: Elemental Storm

feature_description: Companion creates a circle of healing energy that restores Health to allies within over time.
name: Grand Healing

feature_description: Companion blesses an ally with regenerative energy, healing them over time.
name: Regeneration

feature_description: Companion blesses allies in an area, healing them and granting Minor Resolve.
name: Blessing of Protection

feature_description: Companion conjures a protective ward that absorbs damage for an ally based on their missing Health.
name: Steadfast Ward

feature_description: Companion channels healing energy, restoring Health to nearby allies over time and granting Major Protection.
name: Panacea

feature_description: Companion gains increased Magicka Recovery and Spell Critical when wearing Light Armor pieces.
name: Light Armor Proficiency

feature_description: Companion gains reduced Magicka cost for abilities when wearing Light Armor.
name: Evocation

feature_description: Companion can activate a damage shield that absorbs spell damage based on Light Armor pieces worn.
name: Annulment

feature_description: Companion gains increased Stamina Recovery and Weapon Critical when wearing Medium Armor pieces.
name: Medium Armor Proficiency

feature_description: Companion gains increased Weapon Damage when wearing Medium Armor.
name: Agility

feature_description: Companion can activate increased dodge chance and movement speed based on Medium Armor pieces worn.
name: Evasion

feature_description: Companion gains increased Health and reduced damage taken when wearing Heavy Armor pieces.
name: Heavy Armor Proficiency

feature_description: Companion gains increased Health Recovery and block mitigation when wearing Heavy Armor.
name: Constitution

feature_description: Companion can activate crowd control immunity and increased armor based on Heavy Armor pieces worn.
name: Immovable

feature_description: Companion fires a Dawnguard bolt at an enemy, dealing Physical Damage. Deals bonus damage to Undead and Daedra.
name: Silver Bolts

feature_description: Companion creates a rune on the ground that heals allies and applies Minor Protection.
name: Circle of Protection

feature_description: Companion wields Meridia's sacred sword, dealing Physical Damage to enemies and additional damage to Undead.
name: Dawnbreaker

feature_description: Companion summons a ball of light that reveals stealthed enemies and grants Major Prophecy.
name: Magelight

feature_description: Companion places a fire rune on the ground that explodes when triggered, dealing Flame Damage.
name: Fire Rune

feature_description: Companion calls down a meteor from the sky, dealing massive Flame Damage in an area and stunning enemies.
name: Meteor

feature_description: Mirri's Dunmer heritage grants increased Flame Resistance and bonus damage with Flame abilities.
name: Mirri's Expertise

feature_description: Bastian's Imperial heritage grants increased Health and bonus damage with sword abilities.
name: Bastian's Expertise

feature_description: Ember's Khajiit heritage grants increased Stealth detection radius and bonus Critical Damage.
name: Ember's Expertise

feature_description: Isobel's Breton heritage grants increased Spell Resistance and bonus Magicka Recovery.
name: Isobel's Expertise

feature_description: Sharp-as-Night's Argonian heritage grants increased Poison Resistance and bonus Healing Done.
name: Sharp's Expertise

feature_description: Azandar's Redguard heritage grants increased Stamina and bonus Stamina Recovery.
name: Azandar's Expertise

feature_description: Zerith-var's unique heritage grants increased Spell Damage and bonus damage with Necromancer abilities.
name: Zerith-var's Expertise

feature_description: Tanlorin's Altmer heritage grants increased Magicka and bonus damage with Flame abilities.
name: Tanlorin's Expertise
